task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for French Quarter Townhouse in New Orleans LA (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $1850000.00 and wholesale is $1480000.00. Product features: 3-bedroom historic townhouse with courtyard and wrought-iron balconies. Reference: https://www.latter-blum.com/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for French Quarter Townhouse in New Orleans LA. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying French Quarter Townhouse in New Orleans LA. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
